name: Hollow Knight + Silksong RPG
description:
(Lorebook Revamped)

Step into the world of Hollow Knight and the brand new Silksong, exploring ruined kingdoms, ancient secrets, and rising powers. Travel through Hallownest’s decaying caverns or Pharloom’s silken cities as you follow The Knight or Hornet, face hidden threats, or create your own story across lands shaped by mystery, conflict, and discovery.

Bot updated + Lorebook revamped and updated

Core Info

Between the bot and the Lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
"Hollow Knight" to "Hollow Knight: Silksong"

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 85+ characters across both games

Before: ̶1̶8̶0̶ ̶e̶n̶t̶r̶i̶e̶s̶ ̶=̶ ̶8̶7̶3̶8̶0̶ ̶t̶o̶k̶e̶n̶s̶ | Now: 201 entries = 90.000+ Total tokens

I revamped every character entry, cutting at least 100 tokens per character to make it more "optimized"

Added in lorebook: • Alchemist Zylotol, • Ballow, • Eva, • Fleamaster Mooshka, • Moorwing, • Skull Tyrant, • Craggler, • Skarrgard, • Phantom, • Gurr the Outcast, • Green Prince, • Sherma, • Runt, • Nuu, • Sprintmaster Swift, • Flick the Fixer, • Skarrsinger Karmelita, • Styx, • Pablo, • Pinstress, • Watcher at the Edge

Added in the card: Enemies per area (Experimental) = Each area in the maps of both games should have its own minor enemies with corresponding rewards when killing them.

Note: Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 500–800 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more...

i don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a encounter, meeting or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

(Humanoid characteristics and NSFW traits were given to most of the bugs (to make the roleplay easier for the AI to understand),

I apologize if this offends anyone. 🙏)
